text_block_list.text:
Doubling as preparation for regional<n>races, our
senior-year summer camp<n>officially begins.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru vows to do<n>everything she
can during the<n>grueling summer training to show
just how far she's come.

Intent on making her own luck<n>through diligent
effort, she leaps into<n>action under the bright
summer sky.
